## What this changes

Describe the change in one or two lines.

## Checklist

- [ ] A rule I added is true on the live tool, correctness over confidence
- [ ] Every rule I added has a leave alone clause
- [ ] A linter change ships a good fixture and a bad fixture
- [ ] bash foundry/scripts/tests/run-tests.sh is green
- [ ] Manifest versions are in sync
- [ ] No AI attribution in the commits or this pull request
